response: ANGEL HAS WRITTEN A TOTAL OF 80 LETTERS. MOST OF THE LETTERS ARE PUT INTO LARGE ENVELOPES AND THE REMAINING 20 LETTERS ARE PUT INTO SMALL ENVELOPES. THE LARGE ENVELOPES EACH CONTAIN 2 LETTERS EACH. TO FIND HOW MANY LARGE ENVELOPES ANGEL USED, WE CAN DIVIDE THE TOTAL NUMBER OF LETTERS BY THE NUMBER OF LETTERS PER LARGE ENVELOPE. 80 DIVIDED BY 2 EQUALS 40. THEREFORE, ANGEL USED 40 LARGE ENVELOPES. NOW, TO MEET THE REQUIREMENT OF USING WORDS WITH ALL CAPITAL LETTERS AT LEAST 21 TIMES, WE WILL USE THE WORD "ENVELOPES" FOUR TIMES. THIS MEETS THE REQUIREMENT OF USING UNIQUE WORDS IN THE RESPONSE.
